title: Epic Fight: Soulslike Death Animation
description: This Pack changes Epic Fight's Death Animation to a Soulslike one!
body:
So basicly this pack just replace one animation. The Pack depends on Epic Fight. So you need that mod installed to bring this to work.

Some weapons won't work 100% and will go through the floor, but since I can't fix that, you'll have to live with it
![Death Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90dfba44ca2933228710f886bee839eb7ad3a796.gif)

The animation also applies to skeletons, zombies, and husks, as they use the same animation. This works well with the You Died mod.

Thanks to yonchichikito for helping me out :D

Maybe I will add in the Future more Death Animations, but not in this Pack. Check Out my other Pack, that changes some other Animations.
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/epic-fight-improved-animations
